title: RBI invites public comments on the draft Amendment Directions on ‘Investment Fluctuation Reserve’
description: Reserve Bank of India today placed on its website the following draft Amendment Directions which modify the extant instructions on Investment Fluctuation Reserve (IFR) for various categories of banks: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026; Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026; Reserve Bank of India (P
